hyperedges.label: Auth screens share role-based router pattern
Legacy mobile admin screens superseded by web portal
Themed styling pipeline (color scheme + theme color + themed components)
Locked Sprint 1 decisions (auth, IA, ecosystem, hosting)
Parent-Student Linking Feature
hyperedges.summary: PIN-based parent-student linking system: junction table, PIN invitations, indexes, and cleanup function.

hyperedges.label: School Admin + Org + Roles Stack
hyperedges.summary: Progressive expansion of users.role check constraint and supporting profile tables (schools, organizers).

hyperedges.label: Sprint 14 Audit & Compliance Stack
hyperedges.description: Three migrations together implement the Sprint 14 UU PDP compliance feature: append-only audit log, soft-delete on PII tables, and webhook idempotency to prevent double-settlement.

hyperedges.label: Sprint 16 School Self-Signup + Verification Flow
hyperedges.description: Migration adds verification columns; schools router exposes signup + verify endpoints; feature node summarizes the F-SP-01 spec realization.

hyperedges.label: Sprint 15 Launch 1 Polish (KID + Payer)
hyperedges.description: Three migrations together complete Sprint 15 schema polish: stable Person-KID, payer attribution per F-PY-03, and removal of legacy orphan column.

hyperedges.label: Admin routes auth+audit stack
hyperedges.summary: All admin routes flow through authMiddleware + adminOnly + audit() and write to audit_log on success.

hyperedges.label: Rate limiter family
hyperedges.summary: express-rate-limit family covering OTP, login, bulk upload, and PIN verification abuse vectors.

hyperedges.label: Audit-instrumented routes
hyperedges.summary: audit() middleware applied across admin and organizer write routes to log to audit_log on 2xx.

hyperedges.label: Payment settlement flow (Snap → webhook → settlement)
hyperedges.summary: End-to-end payment lifecycle: app calls POST /snap (payments_snap_endpoint) → midtrans_service issues Snap token → user pays in Snap UI → Midtrans posts to payments_webhook_handler → signature verified + idempotency dedupe via payment_webhook_events → registrations status flips to pending_review → push_service notifies student. Verify endpoint is sandbox fallback.

hyperedges.label: Bulk registration pipeline (CSV → cron → email)
hyperedges.summary: School/admin uploads CSV (rate-limited 3/hr) → row written to bulk_registration_jobs → cron_service.scheduleBulkJobProcessor fires every minute → bulk_processor_service.processPendingJobs claims a job → per row: NISN/email/hard-match lookup, atomic quota decrement, registration insert, post-commit email_service.sendTempPasswordEmail using auth_service.hashPassword for new accounts.

hyperedges.label: Retention/compliance sweep (Sprint 14)
hyperedges.summary: cron_retention_enforcement runs daily 02:00: soft-deletes documents whose competition ended >1y ago, hard-deletes audit_log >5y, hard-deletes read notifications >1y. runbook_playbook_soft_delete documents recovery. storage_service signed URLs (15-min expiry) protect any documents that survive the sweep.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite+Express admin stack vs current Next.js+shared-backend stack
hyperedges.rationale: Captures the deprecated Vite SPA + standalone Express admin server (port 4000) and how it has been replaced by Next.js App Router proxying /api/* to the unified backend on port 3000.

hyperedges.label: Legacy admin write-side route surface sharing pg pool
hyperedges.rationale: All legacy admin routes share a single pg Pool and use raw SQL CRUD; mirrors the current backend's no-ORM convention.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite client API surface mapped to legacy Express routes
hyperedges.rationale: End-to-end legacy contract: typed authApi/schoolsApi/competitionsApi/usersApi/notificationsApi calls match the legacy Express endpoints one-to-one.

hyperedges.label: Admin (dashboard) route group
hyperedges.rationale: All pages in web/app/(dashboard)/* are admin-portal pages gated by (dashboard)/layout.tsx — the cookie auth guard for the admin role. Forms a cohesive route group sharing Sidebar nav and adminHttp/api conventions.

hyperedges.label: Organizer (organizer) route group
hyperedges.rationale: All pages under web/app/(organizer)/organizer-competitions/* share the OrganizerProvider auth guard in (organizer)/layout.tsx and the organizerHttp / organizerCompetitionsApi data access pattern.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite vs current Next.js admin page pairs
hyperedges.rationale: The _src-vite-legacy/pages/* directory mirrors the current (dashboard)/* App Router admin pages. Each pair shares state shape, API calls, and UI primitives — the legacy SPA was transcribed to Next.js with cookie auth and 'use client' directives. Useful for tracking migration completeness.

hyperedges.label: School portal pages (verification-gated)
hyperedges.summary: School portal route group. Layout enforces auth + verification gate; unverified school_admin lands on /school-pending. Self-signup is public; login is the entry point for verified users.

hyperedges.label: Organizer portal pages
hyperedges.summary: Organizer portal route group. Login then dashboard, participants viewer, and revenue overview. All hit /api/organizers/*.

hyperedges.label: Public marketing & legal pages
hyperedges.summary: Public-access pages outside any portal: admin login, privacy policy, terms of service. Linked from the role-selector landing page.

hyperedges.label: Cookie-auth context trio (admin/organizer/school)
hyperedges.summary: Three role-specific React contexts that hydrate via GET /auth/me using the shared httpOnly competzy_token cookie; they enforce different role guards (admin / organizer / school_admin|teacher) but otherwise share the same Provider+hydrate+login+logout structure.

hyperedges.label: adminHttp + organizerHttp aliases over single fetch wrapper
hyperedges.summary: adminHttp and organizerHttp in client.ts are named aliases of the same httpReq/httpFormData fetch wrappers (credentials:'include'); api/index.ts and the admin/organizer auth contexts all consume them, decoupling portal call sites from the shared transport.

nodes.label: users (table)
nodes.summary: Core users table; PK uuid; email UNIQUE; phone partial-unique; role enum (student/parent/teacher/school_admin/admin/organizer); school_id FK schools; consent + province + phone_verified_at columns added by later migrations.

nodes.label: otp_codes (table)
nodes.summary: Email OTP codes with expiry and used flag.

nodes.label: students (table)
nodes.summary: Student profile keyed by users.id; school_name, grade, NISN (unique partial), school_id FK schools, supervisor + parent details, student_card_url.

nodes.label: parents (table)
nodes.summary: Parent profile keyed by users.id; child_name, child_school, child_grade, relationship.

nodes.label: teachers (table)
nodes.summary: Teacher profile keyed by users.id; school, subject, department.

nodes.label: competitions (table)
nodes.summary: Competitions table; id became TEXT for slugs; created_by FK users; multi-round + website_url/poster_url/participant_instructions added later.

nodes.label: registrations (table)
nodes.summary: Registration records with TEXT id, user_id FK users, comp_id ref competitions, status check, registration_number unique (KMP-2026-NNNNN), reviewed_by FK, profile_snapshot JSONB.

nodes.label: documents (table)
nodes.summary: User-uploaded documents (file_url, doc_type) FK users.

nodes.label: payments (table)
nodes.summary: Payments table with snap_token, order_id, payment_proof_url; FK registrations and users.

nodes.label: notifications (table)
nodes.summary: In-app notification inbox; FK users; type/title/body/data JSONB; scheduled_for + sent flags for delayed notifications.

nodes.label: competition_views (table)
nodes.summary: Tracks user views of competitions; FK users + competitions.

nodes.label: parent_student_links (table)
nodes.summary: Parent-student junction table; FK users twice; status pending/active/rejected; UNIQUE(parent_id, student_id).

nodes.label: invitations (table)
nodes.summary: Parent invitations with 6-digit verification_pin, expiry 24h, status pending/accepted/expired.

nodes.label: bulk_registration_jobs (table)
nodes.summary: Tracks CSV bulk-upload jobs; FK uploaded_by -> users; csv_data + errors JSONB.

nodes.label: schools (table)
nodes.summary: Schools master table; npsn UNIQUE; name/address/city/province; referenced by users.school_id and students.school_id.

nodes.label: competition_rounds (table)
nodes.summary: Multi-round competition rounds; FK competitions; round_type, dates, fee, location, round_order.

nodes.label: favorites (table)
nodes.summary: User-saved competitions wishlist; FK users + competitions; UNIQUE(user_id, comp_id).

nodes.label: organizers (table)
nodes.summary: Organizer profile keyed by users.id; org_name, bio, website, logo_url, verified flag.

nodes.label: invitations.verification_pin

nodes.label: RUNBOOK.md
nodes.summary: Production on-call runbook. Quick links, deploy steps, playbooks: API down (502), payments not settling (use payment_webhook_events + verify endpoint), file 403, soft-delete recovery, audit-log forensics, rollback.

nodes.label: Runbook: API down/502
nodes.summary: Diagnose pm2 status → logs → memory restart → DB pg_stat_activity. Kill stuck idle-in-transaction queries. Rationale: PM2 process supervision is the first stop because most outages are crashed Node processes, not DB.

nodes.label: Runbook: Payments not settling
nodes.summary: Check Midtrans dashboard, query payment_webhook_events table, re-trigger via GET /api/payments/verify/:id, fall back to Midtrans dashboard webhook resend. Rationale: webhook idempotency table (Sprint 14) makes re-sends safe.

nodes.label: Runbook: File 403
nodes.summary: Signed URLs expire after 15 min — fetch fresh from /api/documents. S3 mode: check MinIO health endpoint. Rationale: signed URLs (Sprint 14) intentionally short-lived to prevent leaked link sharing.

nodes.label: Runbook: Soft-delete recovery
nodes.summary: UPDATE deleted_at = NULL or use restore() helper from query-helpers.ts. Rationale: 9 PII tables soft-delete instead of hard-delete (Sprint 14) so accidents are recoverable.

nodes.label: Runbook: Audit log forensics
nodes.summary: Query audit_log by action prefix or by resource_id. Rationale: append-only audit_log (Sprint 14) records every privileged write so post-incident attribution is possible.

nodes.label: Runbook: Rollback release
nodes.summary: git checkout last-good SHA + rebuild + pm2 reload. For migrations: roll forward with corrective migration, not down-migrate. Rationale: down-migrations risk data loss; corrective forward-migrations are safer in production.

nodes.label: Rationale: webhook idempotency
nodes.summary: Why dedupe via payment_webhook_events ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING: Midtrans retries on non-2xx and can fire duplicate events; without this check, settlements/expiries are double-processed and corrupt registration state.

nodes.label: Rationale: school-named Midtrans receipt
nodes.summary: Sprint 16.4 spec F-PY-03: bulk payments are 'Dibayar oleh sekolah'. Coordinator email remains contact, but Midtrans customer_name is the school's name so reimbursement workflows are unambiguous.

nodes.label: Rationale: hard-match dedup
nodes.summary: Spec F-ID-06 / Sprint 15.6: when NISN+email both miss, link by full_name+school+grade exact match instead of creating duplicate. Throws on >1 match to avoid wrong attribution — operator resolves manually.

nodes.label: Rationale: signed URLs always
nodes.summary: Per CLAUDE.md Sprint 14: sensitive documents (KTP, payment proofs, student cards) must not be guessable or shareable. 15-min signed URLs prevent leaked-link abuse — both S3 presigned and JWT-token paths.

nodes.label: Rationale: verify endpoint
nodes.summary: Sandbox webhook can't reach localhost, so /verify/:id polls Midtrans Status API and force-syncs DB. In production webhook handles settlement; verify is belt-and-suspenders backup.

hyperedges.label: Sprint 14 Audit & Compliance Stack
hyperedges.description: Three migrations together implement the Sprint 14 UU PDP compliance feature: append-only audit log, soft-delete on PII tables, and webhook idempotency to prevent double-settlement.

hyperedges.label: Sprint 16 School Self-Signup + Verification Flow
hyperedges.description: Migration adds verification columns; schools router exposes signup + verify endpoints; feature node summarizes the F-SP-01 spec realization.

hyperedges.label: Sprint 15 Launch 1 Polish (KID + Payer)
hyperedges.description: Three migrations together complete Sprint 15 schema polish: stable Person-KID, payer attribution per F-PY-03, and removal of legacy orphan column.

hyperedges.label: Admin routes auth+audit stack
hyperedges.summary: All admin routes flow through authMiddleware + adminOnly + audit() and write to audit_log on success.

hyperedges.label: Rate limiter family
hyperedges.summary: express-rate-limit family covering OTP, login, bulk upload, and PIN verification abuse vectors.

hyperedges.label: Audit-instrumented routes
hyperedges.summary: audit() middleware applied across admin and organizer write routes to log to audit_log on 2xx.

hyperedges.label: Payment settlement flow (Snap → webhook → settlement)
hyperedges.summary: End-to-end payment lifecycle: app calls POST /snap (payments_snap_endpoint) → midtrans_service issues Snap token → user pays in Snap UI → Midtrans posts to payments_webhook_handler → signature verified + idempotency dedupe via payment_webhook_events → registrations status flips to pending_review → push_service notifies student. Verify endpoint is sandbox fallback.

hyperedges.label: Bulk registration pipeline (CSV → cron → email)
hyperedges.summary: School/admin uploads CSV (rate-limited 3/hr) → row written to bulk_registration_jobs → cron_service.scheduleBulkJobProcessor fires every minute → bulk_processor_service.processPendingJobs claims a job → per row: NISN/email/hard-match lookup, atomic quota decrement, registration insert, post-commit email_service.sendTempPasswordEmail using auth_service.hashPassword for new accounts.

hyperedges.label: Retention/compliance sweep (Sprint 14)
hyperedges.summary: cron_retention_enforcement runs daily 02:00: soft-deletes documents whose competition ended >1y ago, hard-deletes audit_log >5y, hard-deletes read notifications >1y. runbook_playbook_soft_delete documents recovery. storage_service signed URLs (15-min expiry) protect any documents that survive the sweep.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite+Express admin stack vs current Next.js+shared-backend stack
hyperedges.rationale: Captures the deprecated Vite SPA + standalone Express admin server (port 4000) and how it has been replaced by Next.js App Router proxying /api/* to the unified backend on port 3000.

hyperedges.label: Legacy admin write-side route surface sharing pg pool
hyperedges.rationale: All legacy admin routes share a single pg Pool and use raw SQL CRUD; mirrors the current backend's no-ORM convention.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite client API surface mapped to legacy Express routes
hyperedges.rationale: End-to-end legacy contract: typed authApi/schoolsApi/competitionsApi/usersApi/notificationsApi calls match the legacy Express endpoints one-to-one.

hyperedges.label: Admin (dashboard) route group
hyperedges.rationale: All pages in web/app/(dashboard)/* are admin-portal pages gated by (dashboard)/layout.tsx — the cookie auth guard for the admin role. Forms a cohesive route group sharing Sidebar nav and adminHttp/api conventions.

hyperedges.label: Organizer (organizer) route group
hyperedges.rationale: All pages under web/app/(organizer)/organizer-competitions/* share the OrganizerProvider auth guard in (organizer)/layout.tsx and the organizerHttp / organizerCompetitionsApi data access pattern.

hyperedges.label: Legacy Vite vs current Next.js admin page pairs
hyperedges.rationale: The _src-vite-legacy/pages/* directory mirrors the current (dashboard)/* App Router admin pages. Each pair shares state shape, API calls, and UI primitives — the legacy SPA was transcribed to Next.js with cookie auth and 'use client' directives. Useful for tracking migration completeness.

hyperedges.label: School portal pages (verification-gated)
hyperedges.summary: School portal route group. Layout enforces auth + verification gate; unverified school_admin lands on /school-pending. Self-signup is public; login is the entry point for verified users.

hyperedges.label: Organizer portal pages
hyperedges.summary: Organizer portal route group. Login then dashboard, participants viewer, and revenue overview. All hit /api/organizers/*.

hyperedges.label: Public marketing & legal pages
hyperedges.summary: Public-access pages outside any portal: admin login, privacy policy, terms of service. Linked from the role-selector landing page.

hyperedges.label: Cookie-auth context trio (admin/organizer/school)
hyperedges.summary: Three role-specific React contexts that hydrate via GET /auth/me using the shared httpOnly competzy_token cookie; they enforce different role guards (admin / organizer / school_admin|teacher) but otherwise share the same Provider+hydrate+login+logout structure.

hyperedges.label: adminHttp + organizerHttp aliases over single fetch wrapper
hyperedges.summary: adminHttp and organizerHttp in client.ts are named aliases of the same httpReq/httpFormData fetch wrappers (credentials:'include'); api/index.ts and the admin/organizer auth contexts all consume them, decoupling portal call sites from the shared transport.
